tools.name: Age Calculator
tools.description: Calculate exact age in years, months, and days from any birth date. Includes upcoming birthday countdown.
tools.longDescription: Get precise age calculations with detailed breakdown. Perfect for official documents, HR processes, or personal curiosity.

tools.name: Countdown Timer
tools.description: Create beautiful countdowns for events, deadlines, launches, or personal goals with customizable themes.
tools.longDescription: Professional countdown timer with pause, reset, and shareable links. Great for product launches and personal milestones.

tools.name: Days Between Dates
tools.description: Calculate the exact number of days, weeks, and months between any two dates. Includes business days option.
tools.longDescription: Essential for project planning, contract durations, and leave calculations. Supports excluding weekends.

tools.name: EMI Calculator
tools.description: Calculate monthly EMI, total interest, and amortization schedule for home, car, or personal loans.
tools.longDescription: Advanced EMI calculator with detailed repayment schedule. Helps you plan loans and understand true cost of borrowing.

tools.name: GST Calculator
tools.description: Instantly calculate GST amount, CGST, SGST breakdown and final price for any amount in India.
tools.longDescription: Accurate GST calculator supporting all Indian GST slabs. Essential for freelancers, businesses, and e-commerce sellers.

tools.name: AI Prompt Generator
tools.description: Generate high-quality, optimized prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, Grok and other LLMs with advanced templates.
tools.longDescription: Create professional prompts for writing, coding, analysis, and creative tasks. Includes role-playing and chain-of-thought templates.

tools.name: YouTube Title Generator
tools.description: Create click-worthy, SEO-optimized YouTube titles that drive views and improve click-through rates.
tools.longDescription: AI-assisted title generator trained on high-performing video titles. Supports multiple niches and emotional triggers.

tools.name: SEO Meta Generator
tools.description: Generate compelling meta titles, descriptions, and Open Graph tags optimized for search engines and social sharing.
tools.longDescription: Professional SEO meta tag generator. Includes character counters, keyword suggestions, and social preview.

tools.name: Blog Idea Generator
tools.description: Discover trending and evergreen blog post ideas tailored to your niche with AI-powered suggestions.
tools.longDescription: Never run out of content ideas. Generate blog topics based on keywords, trends, and content gaps in your niche.

tools.name: Keyword Density Checker
tools.description: Analyze keyword density, readability, and SEO score of your content. Get actionable recommendations.
tools.longDescription: Advanced on-page SEO analyzer. Helps optimize content for target keywords without overstuffing.
